content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "找不到手機，後來找到了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "昨天早上我出門的時候，發現手機不見了。",
          "pinyin": "Zuótiān zǎoshang wǒ chūmén de shíhou, fāxiàn shǒujī bújiàn le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zuo2 tian1 zao3 shang4 wo3 chu1 men2 de5 shi2 hou4, fa1 xian4 shou3 ji1 bu2 jian4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Yesterday morning when I went out, I found my phone was missing.",
          "translation_ko": "어제 아침에 나갈 때 핸드폰이 없어진 것을 알았어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "真的嗎？那後來呢？",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Nà hòulái ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "zhen1 de5 ma5? Na4 hou4 lai2 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "Really? And then what happened?",
          "translation_ko": "정말요? 그런데 나중에는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我很緊張，到處找，可是找不到。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ hěn jǐnzhāng, dàochù zhǎo, kěshì zhǎo bú dào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "wo3 hen3 jin3 zhang1, dao4 chu4 zhao3, ke3 shi4 zhao3 bu2 dao4.",
          "translation_en": "I was very nervous, looked everywhere, but couldn't find it.",
          "translation_ko": "너무 긴장해서 여기저기 찾았는데 찾을 수 없었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "那怎麼辦？你最後找到了嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà zěnme bàn? Nǐ zuìhòu zhǎodào le ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 zen3 me5 ban4? Ni3 zui4 hou4 zhao3 dao4 le5 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "What did you do then? Did you finally find it?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 어떻게 했어요? 마침내 찾았어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "後來我打電話，聽到手機在沙發下面響。原來掉到沙發下面了！",
          "pinyin": "Hòulái wǒ dǎ diànhuà, tīng dào shǒujī zài shāfā xiàmiàn xiǎng. Yuánlái diào dào shāfā xiàmiàn le!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hou4 lai2 wo3 da3 dian4 hua4, ting1 dao4 shou3 ji1 zai4 sha1 fa1 xia4 mian4 xiang3. Yuan2 lai2 diao4 dao4 sha1 fa1 xia4 mian4 le5!",
          "translation_en": "Later I called it, and heard the phone ringing under the sofa. It had fallen under the sofa!",
          "translation_ko": "나중에 전화를 걸었더니 핸드폰이 소파 아래에서 울리는 소리가 났어요. 알고 보니 소파 밑에 떨어져 있었어요!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "太好了！找到的時候你一定很開心吧？",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le! Zhǎodào de shíhou nǐ yídìng hěn kāixīn ba?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le5! Zhao3 dao4 de5 shi2 hou4 ni3 yi2 ding4 hen3 kai1 xin1 ba5?",
          "translation_en": "That's great! You must have been very happy when you found it, right?",
          "translation_ko": "잘됐네요! 찾았을 때 정말 기뻤겠죠?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對啊，我覺得很開心，終於可以出門了。",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, wǒ juéde hěn kāixīn, zhōngyú kěyǐ chūmén le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a5, wo3 jue2 de5 hen3 kai1 xin1, zhong1 yu2 ke3 yi3 chu1 men2 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, I felt very happy, and finally could go out.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 정말 기뻤어요. 드디어 나갈 수 있었어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where did the phone fall?",
          "question_ko": "핸드폰은 어디에 떨어졌습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Under the bed", "Under the sofa", "In the bag"],
          "options_ko": ["침대 밑", "소파 밑", "가방 안"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "請跟著錄音唸出對話，注意語氣和停頓。",
      "free_response_prompt": "請用中文說一個你曾經找不到東西的故事。"
    },
    {
      "title": "去九份玩的故事",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "上個週末我跟朋友去九份玩，我覺得很好玩。",
          "pinyin": "Shàng ge zhōumò wǒ gēn péngyou qù Jiǔfèn wán, wǒ juéde hěn hǎowán.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Shang4 ge5 zhou1 mo4 wo3 gen1 peng2 you3 qu4 Jiu3 fen4 wan2, wo3 jue2 de5 hen3 hao3 wan2.",
          "translation_en": "Last weekend I went to Jiufen with my friends, I thought it was very fun.",
          "translation_ko": "지난 주말에 친구와 함께 구펀에 놀러 갔는데 정말 재미있었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "九份？那裡有什麼好玩的？",
          "pinyin": "Jiǔfèn? Nàlǐ yǒu shénme hǎowán de?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jiu3 fen4? Na4 li3 you3 shen2 me5 hao3 wan2 de5?",
          "translation_en": "Jiufen? What's fun there?",
          "translation_ko": "구펀요? 거기에 뭐 재미있는 게 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們吃了很多小吃，比如芋圓和滷肉飯。風景也很漂亮。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen chī le hěn duō xiǎochī, bǐrú yùyuán hé lǔròufàn. Fēngjǐng yě hěn piàoliang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 men5 chi1 le5 hen3 duo1 xiao3 chi1, bi3 ru2 yu4 yuan2 he2 lu3 rou4 fan4. Feng1 jing3 ye3 hen3 piao4 liang5.",
          "translation_en": "We ate a lot of snacks, like taro balls and braised pork rice. The scenery was also very beautiful.",
          "translation_ko": "타로볼과 루로우판 같은 길거리 음식을 많이 먹었어요. 경치도 정말 아름다웠어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "聽起來不錯！你們怎麼去的？",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlai búcuò! Nǐmen zěnme qù de?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3 lai5 bu2 cuo4! Ni3 men5 zen3 me5 qu4 de5?",
          "translation_en": "Sounds good! How did you get there?",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮네요! 어떻게 갔어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們先搭捷運到台北車站，然後轉火車到瑞芳，再搭公車上去。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen xiān dā jiéyùn dào Táiběi chēzhàn, ránhòu zhuǎn huǒchē dào Ruìfāng, zài dā gōngchē shàngqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 men5 xian1 da1 jie2 yun4 dao4 Tai2 bei3 che1 zhan4, ran2 hou4 zhuan3 huo3 che1 dao4 Rui4 fang1, zai4 da1 gong1 che1 shang4 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "We first took the MRT to Taipei Main Station, then transferred to a train to Ruifang, and then took a bus up.",
          "translation_ko": "먼저 지하철을 타고 타이베이역에 가서 기차로 루이팡까지 간 다음, 버스를 타고 올라갔어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "原來是這樣。下次我也想去看看。",
          "pinyin": "Yuánlái shì zhèyàng. Xià cì wǒ yě xiǎng qù kànkan.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yuan2 lai2 shi4 zhe4 yang4. Xia4 ci4 wo3 ye3 xiang3 qu4 kan4 kan5.",
          "translation_en": "I see. Next time I also want to go and see.",
          "translation_ko": "그렇군요. 다음에 저도 가보고 싶어요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How did they get to Jiufen?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 어떻게 구펀에 갔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["By car", "By MRT, train, and bus", "By taxi"],
          "options_ko": ["자동차로", "지하철, 기차, 버스로", "택시로"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "請跟著錄音唸出對話，注意語氣和停頓。",
      "free_response_prompt": "請用中文說一個你去某個地方玩的故事。"
    },
    {
      "title": "昨天真是糟糕的一天",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "昨天真是糟糕的一天！",
          "pinyin": "Zuótiān zhēn shì zāogāo de yì tiān!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zuo2 tian1 zhen1 shi4 zao1 gao1 de5 yi4 tian1!",
          "translation_en": "Yesterday was really a terrible day!",
          "translation_ko": "어제는 정말 최악의 날이었어요!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "怎麼了？發生什麼事情？",
          "pinyin": "Zěnme le? Fāshēng shénme shìqing?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zen3 me5 le5? Fa1 sheng1 shen2 me5 shi4 qing5?",
          "translation_en": "What happened? What happened?",
          "translation_ko": "왜요? 무슨 일이 있었어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "早上我起床的時候，發現鬧鐘沒響，所以遲到了。",
          "pinyin": "Zǎoshang wǒ qǐchuáng de shíhou, fāxiàn nàozhōng méi xiǎng, suǒyǐ chídào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zao3 shang4 wo3 qi3 chuang2 de5 shi2 hou4, fa1 xian4 nao4 zhong1 mei2 xiang3, suo3 yi3 chi2 dao4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "In the morning when I got up, I found the alarm didn't ring, so I was late.",
          "translation_ko": "아침에 일어났을 때 알람이 울리지 않은 것을 발견해서 지각했어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "哎呀，那後來呢？",
          "pinyin": "Āiyā, nà hòulái ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ai1 ya1, na4 hou4 lai2 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "Oh dear, and then?",
          "translation_ko": "아이고, 그런데 나중에는요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "然後我出門的時候又下雨了，我忘記帶傘，全身都濕了。",
          "pinyin": "Ránhòu wǒ chūmén de shíhou yòu xiàyǔ le, wǒ wàngjì dài sǎn, quánshēn dōu shī le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ran2 hou4 wo3 chu1 men2 de5 shi2 hou4 you4 xia4 yu3 le5, wo3 wang4 ji4 dai4 san3, quan2 shen1 dou1 shi1 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Then when I went out, it rained again, I forgot to bring an umbrella, and my whole body got wet.",
          "translation_ko": "그리고 나갈 때 비가 또 내렸는데 우산을 가져오는 걸 잊어서 온몸이 다 젖었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "天啊！那你一定很難過吧？",
          "pinyin": "Tiān a! Nà nǐ yídìng hěn nánguò ba?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tian1 a5! Na4 ni3 yi2 ding4 hen3 nan2 guo4 ba5?",
          "translation_en": "Oh my god! You must have been very upset, right?",
          "translation_ko": "세상에! 그럼 정말 속상했겠네요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對啊，我覺得很生氣，可是後來想想，也沒辦法。",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, wǒ juéde hěn shēngqì, kěshì hòulái xiǎngxiǎng, yě méi bànfǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a5, wo3 jue2 de5 hen3 sheng1 qi4, ke3 shi4 hou4 lai2 xiang3 xiang3, ye3 mei2 ban4 fa3.",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, I felt very angry, but later I thought about it, there was nothing I could do.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 정말 화가 났는데 나중에 생각해보니 어쩔 수 없더라고요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why was the person late?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람은 왜 지각했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The bus was late", "The alarm didn't ring", "He woke up late"],
          "options_ko": ["버스가 늦어서", "알람이 울리지 않아서", "늦게 일어나서"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "請跟著錄音唸出對話，注意語氣和停頓。",
      "free_response_prompt": "請用中文說一個你覺得很糟糕的一天。"
    }
  ]
}
